summary: Built the full project: vendored zero-dep engine, CLI, Claude Code SessionStart hook, AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md installers, Cursor rule, optional MCP server, smoke tests, CI.
Vendor the engine into .memory/tools/ of every target project (not just depend on the npm package), so memory keeps working offline and forever, even without ai-universal-memory installed.
Automatic context injection uses a capped ~900 char BRIEF.md via a Claude Code SessionStart hook, not the full history, to keep token cost near zero on every session start.
AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/.claude/settings.json are merged via marker comments / JSON merge, never overwritten, so existing project instructions and hooks survive re-installs.
npm package name 'ai-universal-memory' was unclaimed as of 2026-07-09.
Create the GitHub repo kinzartmusica/ai-universal-memory and push
Publish 0.1.0 to npm (npm publish --access public) once repo is pushed
Add more engine installers: Windsurf, Zed, JetBrains AI Assistant
Consider aum search / snapshot diff commands
Corrected GitHub username from placeholder kinzartmusica to actual authenticated account kinzart across package.json, LICENSE and .memory/
Fixed package.json bin paths (npm was silently dropping bin entries with a leading ./ prefix during publish) via npm pkg fix
